comments:
Pointer - low-level pointer input atoms for mouse, touch, and pen.

Models the W3C Pointer Events specification with bounded types.
All pointer metrics are normalized to [0,1] or bounded ranges.

## Dependencies
- Prelude (Eq, Ord, Show, Semiring, Ring)
- Data.Generic.Rep (Generic)

## Dependents
- Gestural.Touch (uses PointerPosition, Pressure)
- Gestural.Gesture (uses PointerState)
- Gestural.Event (uses MouseButton, PointerPosition, PointerState)
- GPU.FrameState (re-exports MouseButton for mouse state)
- Component.* (interactive components)

declarations.comments:
Mouse button identifiers per W3C UIEvents specification

Maps to the `button` property of MouseEvent:
- 0: Main button (usually left)
- 1: Auxiliary button (usually middle/wheel)
- 2: Secondary button (usually right)
- 3: Fourth button (typically browser back)
- 4: Fifth button (typically browser forward)

This is the authoritative source of MouseButton - GPU.FrameState imports from here.
declarations.title: MouseButton

declarations.comments:
Is this a primary button (left)?

Primary is the main action button, typically left.
declarations.title: isPrimaryButton

declarations.comments:
Is this a secondary button (right)?

Secondary is the context menu button, typically right.
declarations.title: isSecondaryButton

declarations.comments:
Is this an auxiliary button (middle)?

Auxiliary is the middle/wheel button.
declarations.title: isAuxiliaryButton

declarations.comments:
Convert mouse button to W3C button index

Per W3C UIEvents:
- 0: Main (left)
- 1: Auxiliary (middle)
- 2: Secondary (right)
- 3: Fourth (back)
- 4: Fifth (forward)
declarations.title: mouseButtonToInt

declarations.comments:
Convert W3C button index to MouseButton

Returns Nothing for unknown button indices.
declarations.title: mouseButtonFromInt

declarations.comments:
Type of pointing device per W3C Pointer Events spec

Used to distinguish input modality for appropriate feedback:
- Mouse: hover states, cursor changes, right-click
- Touch: larger hit targets, no hover, gestures
- Pen: pressure sensitivity, tilt, barrel button
declarations.title: PointerType

declarations.comments: Is this an unknown pointer type?
declarations.title: isUnknownPointer

declarations.comments: Parse pointer type from W3C pointerType string
declarations.title: pointerTypeFromString

declarations.comments:
Complete pointer position in multiple coordinate systems

Per W3C Pointer Events, position is expressed relative to:
- client: viewport (visible area)
- page: document (including scroll)
- screen: physical display
- offset: target element
declarations.title: PointerPosition

declarations.comments:
Create pointer position from client coordinates
Page and screen default to client values (caller can override)
declarations.title: pointerPosition

declarations.comments: Get offset X coordinate (relative to target)
declarations.title: offsetX

declarations.comments: Get offset Y coordinate (relative to target)
declarations.title: offsetY

declarations.comments:
Pressure/force applied by pointer, normalized to [0, 1]

- 0.0: no pressure (hovering or not supported)
- 0.5: normal touch pressure
- 1.0: maximum pressure

Mouse always reports 0.5 when button is pressed, 0 otherwise.
Touch and pen report actual pressure if hardware supports it.
declarations.title: Pressure

declarations.comments:
Pen tilt along X axis in degrees [-90, 90]

- 0: perpendicular to surface
- Negative: tilted left
- Positive: tilted right
declarations.title: TiltX

declarations.comments:
Pen tilt along Y axis in degrees [-90, 90]

- 0: perpendicular to surface
- Negative: tilted toward user
- Positive: tilted away from user
declarations.title: TiltY

declarations.comments:
Pen rotation/twist around its axis in degrees [0, 360)

Also known as "barrel rotation" on some devices.
Wraps at 360 degrees.
declarations.title: Twist

declarations.comments:
Size of pointer contact area in CSS pixels

For mouse: always 1x1 (point)
For touch: contact ellipse dimensions
For pen: tip contact area
declarations.title: PointerSize

declarations.comments: Get approximate contact radius (average of width/height / 2)
declarations.title: pointerRadius

declarations.comments:
Complete pointer state combining all pointer attributes

This is the molecule that combines all pointer atoms into
a single coherent state object for event handling.
declarations.title: PointerState

declarations.comments:
Bounds for Pressure

Min: 0.0 (no pressure/hovering)
Max: 1.0 (maximum pressure)
declarations.title: pressureBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for TiltX

Min: -90.0 (tilted fully left)
Max: 90.0 (tilted fully right)
declarations.title: tiltXBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for TiltY

Min: -90.0 (tilted fully away)
Max: 90.0 (tilted fully toward)
declarations.title: tiltYBounds

declarations.comments:
Bounds for Twist

Min: 0.0
Max: 359.0 (cyclic rotation)
declarations.title: twistBounds

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Gestural.Pointer
